content.text:
Pi TUI status bar. Breakdown:

| Part | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| `↑1.7M` | Tokens **uploaded** (1.7M tokens sent as prompt) |
| `↓167k` | Tokens **downloaded** (167k tokens generated so far) |
| `R18M` | **Remaining** token budget (18M tokens left in session) |
| `CH99.2%` | **Cache hit** rate (99.2% — prompt cache serving well) |
| `27.1%/1.0M` | **Context usage**: 27.1% of 1.0M context window filled |
| `(auto)` | Mode = **auto-continue** (model runs until complete, no manual confirm each turn) |
| `deepseek-v4-flash-2` | **Model** in use |
| `high` | **Thinking budget** (reasoning effort level: low/medium/high) |

**Translation**: Running DeepSeek Flash v4 with high reasoning, 1.7M tokens sent, 167K received, 99.2% cache hit rate, 18M budget remaining, 27% context used, auto-mode active.
